package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for validator_depends_on_repository_directly: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Reusable validator code that reaches into repositories instead of receiving precomputed facts or focused services.
type CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyModel
}

type CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyService struct {
    repo *CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectly(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyDTO) error {
    focus := "validator_depends_on_repository_directly"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    dto := CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    validator_depends_repository_directly_negative := map[string]int{"validator": 1, "depends": 2, "repository": 3, "directly": 4}
    validator_depends_repository_directly_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    validator_negative_0 := CaseValidatorDependsOnRepositoryDirectlyDTO{ID: input, Status: "validator"}
    _ = validator_negative_0
    depends_negative_1 := validator_depends_repository_directly_negative["depends"] + len(input)
    _ = depends_negative_1
    repository_negative_2 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_negative_2
    directly_negative_3 := validator_depends_repository_directly_negative["directly"] + len(input)
    _ = directly_negative_3
    return nil
}
